receiptStandards.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
receiptStandards.rule: Documents must be actual tax receipts or invoices preferably scanned not photos; booking confirmations will not suffice

receiptStandards.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
receiptStandards.rule: Online copies are sufficient scanned not photo, a hard copy is not required

receiptStandards.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
receiptStandards.rule: Clear and readable receipts and invoices must be submitted with expenses

receiptStandards.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
receiptStandards.rule: Any personal information not required for reimbursement purposes should be removed before it is submitted

receiptStandards.description: Global People company name on invoice
receiptStandards.rule: Invoice should show Global People s.r.l.
Via Venti Settembre 3, Torino (TO) CAP 10121, Italy
Invoice should show GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Via Uberto Visconti Di Modrone 38, 20122 Milano, Italia

receiptStandards.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
receiptStandards.rule: The Local Employers name and details should appear on invoices, not the workers

receiptStandards.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
receiptStandards.rule: Where it is not possible to use the Local Experts name e.g. on flight tickets/hotels, the workers name and details should be used

receiptStandards.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
receiptStandards.rule: The end client shouldn't be mentioned

compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.grossUpRule: All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax free

compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.grossUpRule: Business expenses related to workers completing their job will usually be tax exempt

compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.grossUpRule: Only purely business related elements of this expense will be tax free, anything additional will be subject to tax

compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.grossUpRule: Tax free up to 75% of the whole amount

compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.grossUpRule: Any excess kilometers will be subject to tax

compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.grossUpRule: Tax exempt up to 20% of their costs as long as the car is not assigned to a specific employee

compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.grossUpRule: 100% tax exempt if the worker provides evidence of the transportation documents (not applicable for company cars)

compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.grossUpRule: Subject to a tax exemption of 75% on the per diem rate

compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.expenseType: Domestic per diem with supporting documents
compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.grossUpRule: Exempt from tax as long as supporting documents such as receipts are provided

compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: Business Trip - submit a separate report for each trip

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: Car details (the type of car, whether petrol/electric/hybrid, model) must be listed in the expense report

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: Information regarding the route and the kilometers traveled, which must be reported with indication of the starting point and arrival point

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: Scan of the card passport (libretto di circolazione), as it will contain all information regarding the car owner

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: Any screenshot from any app that can track start point, arrival point and KM will work (like google maps) to keep track of the travelled KM

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: Full details of the vehicle and proof of distance travelled should be provided as well (e.g. google maps)

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: Parking fees are excluded from the per diem rate and should be reimbursed against receipts

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: Workers must always provide receipts when per diems are in place

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: You cannot mix per diem method with actual expenses. You will need to agree with the worker on one method per business trip

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: Under Budget Law 2025, obligation to use traceable payment methods: Bank transfers, Postal transfers, Credit cards, Debit cards, Prepaid cards, Bank or cashier's checks

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: If reimbursements are not made via traceable methods they will not be considered deductible

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: The worker will always need to mention the 3rd party detail

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: Receipts should be submitted with the same currency and clear exchange rate

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: Without supporting documents any applicable tax exemption cannot be applied

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.icpName: Global People s.r.l. / GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: Tax exemptions will only be applied providing sufficient proof is shared e.g. tax receipts, invoices etc
